<!--
  PRs target `develop`. Feature branches → PR → review → merge to develop.
  See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full branching model.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why is it needed? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is cut from `develop` and this PR targets `develop`
- [ ] App boots with no console errors (`npm start`)
- [ ] UI shows **real fetched data** and a sane empty state (no demo/placeholder values)
- [ ] No hardcoded GitHub username/org or absolute home paths (`os.homedir()` used)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env`/`.securevault/` contents committed
- [ ] Read-only to scanned repos preserved (no writes/PRs against user repos)
